scenarios.id: Precedence1 - On boolean values-[1] Exclusive disjunction takes precedence over inclusive disjunction
scenarios.description: [1] Exclusive disjunction takes precedence over inclusive disjunction
scenarios.query:
RETURN true OR true XOR true AS a,
       true OR (true XOR true) AS b,
       (true OR true) XOR true AS c
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: standalone RETURN not supported

scenarios.id: Precedence1 - On boolean values-[14] Exclusive disjunction takes precedence over inclusive disjunction in every combination of truth values
scenarios.description: [14] Exclusive disjunction takes precedence over inclusive disjunction in every combination of truth values
scenarios.query:
UNWIND [true, false, null] AS a
UNWIND [true, false, null] AS b
UNWIND [true, false, null] AS c
WITH collect((a OR b XOR c) = (a OR (b XOR c))) AS eq,
     collect((a OR b XOR c) <> ((a OR b) XOR c)) AS neq
RETURN all(x IN eq WHERE x) AND any(x IN neq WHERE x) AS result
scenarios.skip_reason: parser: UNWIND keyword not yet in grammar
